scripts.mobile:copy: npm run mobile:prepare && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs local copy android
scripts.mobile:copy:hosted: npm run mobile:prepare && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs hosted copy android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs local sync android
scripts.mobile:sync:hosted: npm run mobile:prepare && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs hosted sync android
scripts.mobile:open: npm run mobile:sync && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs local open android
scripts.mobile:open:hosted: npm run mobile:sync:hosted && node scripts/run-capacitor.mjs hosted open android
scripts.mobile:apk:debug: npm run mobile:sync && npm run mobile:doctor && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:apk:release: npm run mobile:sync && npm run mobile:doctor && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleRelease
